text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump has ordered the US Navy to “shoot and kill any boat” that is laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz, with no hesitation. He also ordered mine‑sweeping operations to continue at triple the current level. Trump added that all 159…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump reposted a comment by X user with the name Marc Thiessen stating: “If there are two factions in Iran, one that wants a deal and one that doesn’t, let’s kill the ones who don’t want a deal.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普已下令美国海军“射杀任何”在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的船只，不得有任何犹豫。他还下令扫雷行动以当前三倍的水平继续进行。特朗普补充说，所有159艘……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普转发了X用户Marc Thiessen的一条评论，称：“如果伊朗存在两个派系，一个想要达成协议，另一个不想，那就干掉那些不想达成协议的人。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violation and attacks on civilians in Tairi, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Taybeh at 06:00 using appropriate weapons.” @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a second statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violation and attacks on civilians in Tairi, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Taybeh at 10:00 using an explosive drone.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党发表声明称：“为回应以色列违反停火协议并袭击泰里（Tairi）平民的行为，我们于06:00使用适当武器袭击了泰贝（Taybeh）的一处以色列士兵集结地。” @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发表了第二份声明：“为回应以色列违反停火协议并袭击泰里平民的行为，我们于10:00使用爆炸无人机袭击了泰贝的一处以色列士兵集结地。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 Reuters: France is sending nearly 10 tons of humanitarian aid to Lebanon, including tents, cooking kits and lamps, to support displaced populations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 路透社：法国正向黎巴嫩运送近10吨人道主义援助物资，包括帐篷、炊具和灯具，以支持流离失所的民众。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violation and attacks on civilians in Tairi, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Taybeh at 06:00 using appropriate weapons.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发表声明称：“为回应以色列违反停火协议并袭击泰里平民的行为，我们于06:00使用适当武器袭击了泰贝的一处以色列士兵集结地。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 The IRGC Navy announces the seizure of two vessels in the coast of Iran. MSC-FRANCESCA with alleged links to Israel, and EPAMINODES, were seized by the IRGC Navy and directed to the coast of Iran. IRGC Navy added that the ships violated maritime security…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reuters: The two cargo ships seized by the IRGC Navy have been taken to the Port of Bandar Abbas. A one of the relatives of the seafarers reports that Iran is treating the crew well. "Some 20 Iranians armed to the teeth stormed the ship. Sailors are under Iranians' control, their movements on the ship are limited, but the Iranians are treating them well." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 伊斯兰革命卫队海军宣布在伊朗海岸扣押了两艘船只。据称与以色列有关联的MSC-FRANCESCA号和EPAMINODES号被伊斯兰革命卫队海军扣押，并被引导至伊朗海岸。伊斯兰革命卫队海军补充说，这些船只违反了海上安全……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 路透社：被伊斯兰革命卫队海军扣押的两艘货船已被带往阿巴斯港。一名船员的亲属报告称，伊朗对船员待遇良好。“大约20名全副武装的伊朗人冲上了船。船员处于伊朗人的控制之下，他们在船上的活动受到限制，但伊朗人对他们很好。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Ukrainians are afraid to call the police for fear that they or their loved ones will be mobilized, the head of the National Police Ivan Vygovsky admitted: “Society has been negatively disposed towards police officers lately. And it's understandable why: we are involved in the mobilization together with the TCC.” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 乌克兰人不敢报警，生怕自己或亲人被动员，国家警察局局长伊万·维戈夫斯基（Ivan Vygovsky）承认：“最近社会对警察持负面态度。原因显而易见：我们正与领土征兵中心（TCC）一起参与动员工作。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Jadeed: Lebanon is expected to request an extension of the ceasefire in today’s Israel‑Lebanon meeting in Washington, while Israel is expected to ask for a higher level of representation in the negotiations. Unlike the previous session, today’s meeting is closed to the press. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Jadeed电视台：预计黎巴嫩将在今天华盛顿举行的以黎会议上要求延长停火协议，而以色列预计将要求在谈判中提高代表级别。与之前的会议不同，今天的会议不对媒体开放。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳 French Minister of the Armed Forces Catherine Vautrin announced that Corporal Chief Anicet Girardin of the 132nd Cynotechnical Infantry Regiment has died of his wounds after being shot by Hezbollah fighters in southern Lebanon. He was serving with…" ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 UN Secretary-General António Guterres condemned the 18 April attack on a UNIFIL patrol in southern Lebanon in which peacekeepers came under fire from non‑state actors, presumed to be Hezbollah, while investigating suspected improvised explosive devices. Guterres called for all attacks on peacekeepers to stop, stating that such attacks are grave violations of international humanitarian law and Security Council Resolution 1701, and may amount to war crimes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳 法国武装部队部长凯瑟琳·沃特兰（Catherine Vautrin）宣布，第132犬科步兵团的首席下士阿尼塞·吉拉丁（Anicet Girardin）在黎巴嫩南部被真主党武装人员射击后伤重不治。他当时正在服役……” ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 联合国秘书长古特雷斯谴责了4月18日对黎巴嫩南部联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）巡逻队的袭击，当时维和人员在调查疑似简易爆炸装置时遭到非国家行为体（推测为真主党）的开火。古特雷斯呼吁停止所有针对维和人员的袭击，称此类袭击严重违反国际人道法和安理会第1701号决议，并可能构成战争罪。 @wfwitness

text: Trump reposts some “advice” on Truth Social.
text_zh: 特朗普在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上转发了一些“建议”。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump says that he ordered to shoot and kill any boat that's putting mines in the Strait of Hormuz 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普表示，他已下令射杀任何在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的船只 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid : 🚨 Trump on Truth Social: I have ordered the United States Navy to shoot and kill any boat, small boats though they may be (Their naval ships are ALL, 159 of them, at the bottom of the sea!), that is putting mines in the waters of the Strait of Hormuz. There is to be no hesitation. Additionally, our mine “sweepers” are clearing the Strait right now. I am hereby ordering that activity to continue, but at a tripled up level! Thank you for your attention to this matter tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @BarakRavid：🚨 特朗普在“真实社交”上表示：我已下令美国海军射杀任何在霍尔木兹海峡水域布雷的船只，哪怕是小船（他们的海军舰艇全部159艘，都已沉入海底！）。不得有任何犹豫。此外，我们的扫雷舰目前正在清理海峡。我在此下令该行动继续进行，但要以三倍的力度！感谢您对此事的关注 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah kiIIed 2 French soldiers this week, yet France under President Macron has still not designated or sanctioned the Hezbollah terror party. Now France plans to sanction Israel. The joke writes itself. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047293622425428424/photo/1 FRANCE WARNS ISRAEL: SANCTIONS COMING WITHIN DAYS 🔴 French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot: “If the Israeli government does not change its policies in Gaza, the West Bank, and Lebanon, we cannot act as if nothing has happened.” Sanctions against Israel are currently being blocked due to Hungary's veto. However, I believe this veto will be lifted (with new Hungary PM) and that these sanctions will be implemented in the coming days.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党本周杀害了2名法国士兵，但马克龙总统领导下的法国仍未将真主党恐怖组织定性或制裁。现在法国计划制裁以色列。这简直是个笑话。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047293622425428424/photo/1 法国警告以色列：制裁即将在几天内实施 🔴 法国外交部长让-诺埃尔·巴罗（Jean-Noël Barrot）：“如果以色列政府不改变其在加沙、西岸和黎巴嫩的政策，我们就不能表现得好像什么都没发生过一样。” 目前针对以色列的制裁因匈牙利的否决而被阻止。然而，我相信这种否决将会被解除（随着匈牙利新总理上任），这些制裁将在未来几天内实施。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel NYT: Mojtaba has not released a recorded message because he does not want to appear vulnerable or sound weak. The report says that due to security concerns and his current situation, he has delegated significant authority to military generals, who are now the dominant voice in key decisions. According to the NYT, those generals also ordered the cancellation of the Iranian delegation’s planned arrival in Pakistan this week ahead of the second round of talks. Mojtaba Khamenei remains in a hard-to-access hideout with limited entry, surrounded mainly by medical staff. - NYT https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047289606517707066/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 《纽约时报》：莫杰塔巴（Mojtaba）没有发布录音信息，因为他不想显得脆弱或听起来软弱。报道称，由于安全担忧和目前的处境，他已将重大权力下放给军事将领，这些人现在是关键决策中的主导声音。据《纽约时报》报道，这些将领还下令取消了伊朗代表团原定于本周在第二轮会谈前抵达巴基斯坦的计划。莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊仍躲在一个难以进入的藏身处，入口有限，周围主要是医务人员。 - 《纽约时报》 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047289606517707066/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 Zelensky rejected the possibility of limited membership in the EU for Ukraine, and is only counting on full-fledged membership. He believes that Ukraine deserves membership, because, in his opinion, they are protecting Europe - so partial formats will not even be discussed 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 泽连斯基拒绝了乌克兰成为欧盟有限成员的可能性，只指望成为正式成员。他认为乌克兰理应获得成员资格，因为在他看来，他们正在保护欧洲——所以部分格式甚至不会被讨论 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 📝 А что отслеживают спутники? 📝 Еще один признак подготовки американских войск – это повышенное внимание спутников военного назначения ВС США к нескольким объектам на территории Ирана, которые усиленно отслеживают в высокой и максимальной детализации. 🖍 В их числе шесть основных объектов. Подземная ракетная база в провинции Керманшах , завод по обогащению урана в Натанзе , район добычи урана к востоку от Тегерана , а также три острова у Ормузского пролива – Абу-Муса , Форур и Сири . 🚩 Все эти объекты так или иначе уже мелькали в американских планах на наземную операцию. Ракетные подземные базы – то, что американцам не удалось поразить, а лишь временно завалить выходы и входы. И иранцы уже их откопали. 🏳️ Завод по обогащению урана и место его добычи – это то, что особенно интересно США в контексте наземной операции. О вывозе урана Трамп мечтает особенно сильно, но все эти планы выглядят, мягко говоря, несостоятельными с учетом того, что процесс является технически сложным . ❗️ Ну а острова у Ормузского пролива – это то, что необходимо американцам для потенциальной деблокады транспортной артерии. Без контроля над этими клочками земли, а также еще несколькими неподалеку, планы на восстановление сообщения так и останутся планами. Карта в высоком разрешении English version #Иран #США ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 卫星在追踪什么？ 📝 美国军队准备工作的另一个迹象是，美国军用卫星对伊朗境内几个目标的关注度提高，这些目标正以高分辨率和最高细节被密切追踪。 🖍 其中包括六个主要目标。克尔曼沙汗省的地下导弹基地、纳坦兹的铀浓缩工厂、德黑兰东部的铀矿开采区，以及霍尔木兹海峡附近的三个岛屿——阿布穆萨岛、大通布岛（Forur）和小通布岛（Sirri）。 🚩 所有这些目标都以某种方式出现在美国的地面行动计划中。地下导弹基地是美国人未能摧毁、只能暂时封堵出入口的地方。而伊朗人已经把它们挖开了。 🏳️ 铀浓缩工厂和铀矿开采地是美国在地面行动背景下特别感兴趣的地方。特朗普特别渴望运走铀，但考虑到该过程在技术上很复杂，所有这些计划看起来至少可以说是站不住脚的。 ❗️ 至于霍尔木兹海峡附近的岛屿，这是美国人潜在解除运输动脉封锁所必需的。如果没有对这些土地碎片以及附近其他几个岛屿的控制，恢复交通的计划将永远只是计划。高分辨率地图 英文版 #伊朗 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump has ordered the US Navy to “shoot and kill any boat” that is laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz, with no hesitation. He also ordered mine‑sweeping operations to continue at triple the current level. Trump added that all 159 of Iran’s naval ships are already “at the bottom of the sea”. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普已下令美国海军“射杀任何”在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的船只，不得有任何犹豫。他还下令扫雷行动以当前三倍的水平继续进行。特朗普补充说，伊朗所有159艘海军舰艇都已经“沉入海底”。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar : The UAE has hired a PR firm to improve its image in Africa after its role in the US‑Israeli war on Iran exposed it as a security hub for Washington and damaged its narrative of a “historic Gulf moment” in the continent. Emirati officials have defended their policies, including in Sudan, where they implicitly acknowledged backing the Rapid Support Forces. Analysts describe the UAE’s Africa strategy as sub‑imperial, focused on resource extraction and deepening chaos through alliances with non‑state actors. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 《新闻报》：阿联酋在美以对伊朗战争中的角色使其作为华盛顿安全枢纽的身份暴露，并损害了其在非洲大陆“历史性海湾时刻”的叙事，因此阿联酋聘请了一家公关公司来改善其在非洲的形象。阿联酋官员为其政策进行了辩护，包括在苏丹问题上，他们含蓄地承认了对快速支援部队的支持。分析人士将阿联酋的非洲战略描述为次帝国主义，专注于资源开采，并通过与非国家行为体结盟来加剧混乱。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇩🇪 A person threw paint at the former Crown Prince of Iran Reza Pahlavi during his visit to Berlin. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇮🇷 More footage emerging from the incident in Berlin shows an individual throwing red liquid/paint at Reza Pahlavi during his visit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇩🇪 一名男子在伊朗前王储礼萨·巴列维访问柏林期间向其投掷油漆。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇮🇷 柏林事件的更多画面显示，一名个人在礼萨·巴列维访问期间向其投掷了红色液体/油漆。 @wfwitness

text: Trump’s administration reclassified state-licensed medical marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III, meaning it’s now considered less dangerous under U.S. federal law. Source: AP
text_zh: 特朗普政府将州许可的医用大麻从一级管制药物重新分类为三级，这意味着根据美国联邦法律，它现在被认为危险性较低。来源：美联社

text: Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis: It’s China right now that is the export powerhouse, flooding the world with very, very cheap products, and that is threatening our industry.
text_zh: 希腊总理基里亚科斯·米佐塔基斯：目前中国是出口强国，正以非常、非常廉价的产品充斥全球，这正在威胁我们的工业。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "WATCH: An Iranian demonstrator threw paint on Reza Pahlavi in Berlin today." 📸 Reza Pahlavi.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“观看：一名伊朗示威者今天在柏林向礼萨·巴列维投掷油漆。” 📸 礼萨·巴列维。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺🇭🇺 Reuters: The EU has provisionally approved a €90 billion loan package for Ukraine after a months-long delay linked to disputes over oil flows. The breakthrough came as the Druzhba pipeline resumed operations, addressing Hungarian concerns that…" ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 EU Foreign Minister Kallas announced that the EU has come to an agreement on the €90 billion loan for Ukraine and the 20th sanctions package for Russia. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺🇭🇺 路透社：欧盟在经历了数月与石油运输纠纷相关的延误后，已初步批准向乌克兰提供900亿欧元的贷款方案。随着友谊输油管道恢复运营，解决了匈牙利的担忧，这一突破得以实现……” ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 欧盟外交部长卡拉斯宣布，欧盟已就向乌克兰提供900亿欧元贷款以及对俄罗斯的第20轮制裁方案达成一致。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇷 WSJ : The Trump administration is exploring resetting ties with Eritrea, including lifting some sanctions, to counter Iranian influence in the Red Sea. The reclusive state controls over 700 miles of Red Sea coastline, a vital maritime chokepoint threatened by Iran‑backed Houthis. Trump envoy Massad Boulos has met Eritrea’s president and Egyptian leader Sisi to advance the dialogue. Eritrea has been described as “Africa’s North Korea” for its repression, but officials argue the status quo of sanctions isn’t working. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇷 《华尔街日报》：特朗普政府正在探索重置与厄立特里亚的关系，包括解除部分制裁，以对抗伊朗在红海的影响力。这个与世隔绝的国家控制着超过700英里的红海海岸线，这是一个受到伊朗支持的胡塞武装威胁的重要海上咽喉要道。特朗普特使马萨德·布洛斯已会见厄立特里亚总统和埃及领导人塞西以推进对话。厄立特里亚因其压迫性统治被称为“非洲的朝鲜”，但官员们认为目前的制裁现状并不奏效。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Eric Trump said his company has secured a $24 million Pentagon contract for robots, describing the technology as a game‑changer for industry, military applications and hospitality. “We have to win robotics in the United States of America. We had to win that digital revolution [with crypto]. We better be winning this race in the United States of America. We’re the greatest economy in the world and that’s exactly what Sanket’s doing.” “When you go up and you interact with these robots and they fist bump you, they high five you, they follow your commands. You bring in AI economy. It’s gonna change industry. It’s gonna change military application. It’s gonna change hospitality. The uses are unlimited and I think it’s a very beautiful thing, but we must win that race.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 埃里克·特朗普表示，他的公司已获得一份价值2400万美元的五角大楼机器人合同，称该技术将改变工业、军事应用和酒店业。“我们必须在美国赢得机器人技术竞赛。我们必须赢得那场数字革命 [加密货币]。我们最好在美国赢得这场竞赛。我们是世界上最伟大的经济体，这正是Sanket正在做的事情。” “当你走上前去与这些机器人互动时，它们会和你碰拳、击掌，并听从你的指令。你引入了人工智能经济。它将改变工业。它将改变军事应用。它将改变酒店业。用途是无限的，我认为这是一件非常美好的事情，但我们必须赢得这场竞赛。” @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: ✊ Indestructible : How Iran stood firm after the martyrdom of Imam Khamenei? ▫️ How the assassination of Imam Khamenei exposed a deeper reality: the Islamic Republic is built not around one man, but around a system sustained by institutions, faith, and the people. @MKhamenei_en
text_zh: 🔄 转发自阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：✊ 不可摧毁：伊朗在哈梅内伊伊玛目殉难后是如何坚定立场？ ▫️ 哈梅内伊伊玛目的遇刺如何揭示了一个更深层的现实：伊斯兰共和国不是围绕一个人建立的，而是围绕一个由机构、信仰和人民支撑的体系建立的。 @MKhamenei_en

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇭 A T‑50TH training jet of the Royal Thai Air Force skidded off the runway while landing at Wing 1 Air Base in Nakhon Ratchasima. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇭 泰国皇家空军一架 T-50TH 教练机在呵叻府第 1 空军基地降落时滑出跑道。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Palestinian media reports that Israeli troops fatally shot a 16‑year‑old Palestinian, Youssef Sameh Shtayyeh, during a raid on the West Bank city of Nablus. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 巴勒斯坦媒体报道称，以色列军队在对西岸城市纳布卢斯进行突袭时，开枪打死了一名 16 岁的巴勒斯坦人 Youssef Sameh Shtayyeh。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇸🇮🇱 Hamas condemned Israeli strikes in Gaza, including a strike on a "civilian car" in the Maghazi refugee camp that killed three people, and an "overnight massacre" in the northern Strip that killed five, including three children. The group said the…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Haaretz: Israeli fire killed four Palestinians in two separate strikes in Gaza, medics said. An airstrike on a vehicle on Salah al‑Din road in al‑Bureij refugee camp killed three people, including two civil defence paramedics. Earlier, one person was killed and three wounded in Khan Yunis. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇸🇮🇱 哈马斯谴责以色列在加沙的袭击，包括对马加齐难民营一辆‘平民车辆’的袭击，造成三人死亡；以及在加沙地带北部发生的‘彻夜屠杀’，造成五人死亡，其中包括三名儿童。该组织表示……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 《国土报》：医务人员称，以色列在加沙发动的两次独立袭击造成四名巴勒斯坦人死亡。对布雷吉难民营萨拉赫丁路上一辆汽车的空袭造成三人死亡，其中包括两名民防医护人员。早些时候，汗尤尼斯有一人死亡，三人受伤。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Al Arabiya: A senior Pakistani official said there is cautious optimism regarding contacts with the United States and Iran, but Tehran has not yet delivered its response. “Contacts are ongoing,” he stated. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 阿拉伯电视台：一位巴基斯坦高级官员表示，对与美国和伊朗的接触持谨慎乐观态度，但德黑兰尚未给出回应。他表示：“接触正在进行中。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 Lebanese Army Commander Joseph Aoun received Deputy Chief of Staff of the French Army for Operations General Jean-Michel Meunier in Yarzé along with an accompanying delegation. Discussions focused on cooperation between the Lebanese and French armed forces, as well as internal developments in Lebanon and the broader regional situation and its impact on the country. During the meeting, Aoun extended condolences over the death of two members of the French contingent serving with UNIFIL. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 黎巴嫩军队司令约瑟夫·奥恩在亚尔泽会见了法国军队作战副参谋长让-米歇尔·穆尼耶将军及其随行代表团。讨论重点是黎巴嫩和法国武装部队之间的合作，以及黎巴嫩国内局势、更广泛的地区局势及其对该国的影响。会晤期间，奥恩对两名在联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）服役的法国特遣队成员的死亡表示哀悼。 @wfwitness

text: When gravity chooses your nose as its favorite landmark. DO NOT stare at it! 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 当重力选择你的鼻子作为它最喜欢的地标时。千万别盯着它看！🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 i24NEWS: The aircraft carrier USS George H.W. Bush is expected to arrive in the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility in a little less than 48 hours. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 i24NEWS：乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰预计将在不到 48 小时内抵达美国中央司令部责任区。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Haaretz : Israel’s Defence Ministry has signed a multi‑year contract worth $200 million with Elbit Systems for aerial munitions. The deal is part of a policy to expand domestic defence production and reduce reliance on foreign supply chains, following lessons from wartime weapons embargoes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 《国土报》：以色列国防部已与埃尔比特系统公司签署了一份价值 2 亿美元的多年期航空弹药合同。这是继战时武器禁运的教训后，以色列扩大国内国防生产并减少对外国供应链依赖政策的一部分。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Asharq Al-Awsat : French President Macron reaffirmed unlimited support for Lebanon, even after UNIFIL’s mandate ends this year. He said France does not need a seat at the negotiating table to stand by Lebanon, and warned Israel that continued "occupation" and strikes only weaken the prospects of disarming Hezbollah. Macron called Hezbollah’s entry into the war on 2 March a “major strategic mistake”. Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam, after meetings in Luxembourg and Paris, said direct negotiations are not a sign of weakness but a responsible effort to restore sovereignty. Rejecting accusations of treason, he added: “Believe me, we will not allow Hezbollah to intimidate us.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 《中东报》：法国总统马克龙重申，即使在今年联黎部队的任务期限结束后，法国仍将对黎巴嫩提供无限支持。他表示，法国不需要在谈判桌上占有一席之地来支持黎巴嫩，并警告以色列，持续的“占领”和袭击只会削弱解除真主党武装的前景。马克龙称真主党 3 月 2 日参战是一个“重大的战略错误”。黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆在卢森堡和巴黎会晤后表示，直接谈判不是软弱的表现，而是恢复主权的负责任努力。在驳斥叛国指控时，他补充说：“相信我，我们不会允许真主党恐吓我们。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel WATCH 🔴 Hezbollah proudly releases footage showing rocket launches during the ceasefire. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047288484218474764/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报观察 🔴 真主党自豪地发布了停火期间火箭弹发射的画面。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047288484218474764/video/1 推文
